## 🏴‍☠️ SOVEREIGN ISSUE REPORT

### 1. TYPE
- [ ] Bug (I have proof of a physical/logical violation)
- [ ] Feature Request (I have a physics-aligned proposal)
- [ ] Security Audit (I have found a vulnerability in the stack)

### 2. THE PROBLEM / PROPOSAL
### 3. REPRODUCIBLE TEST VECTOR
- Hardware used: [e.g., RK3588, ESP32-S3]
- Environmental variables (RF noise floor, wall material):
- Reproducible steps:

### 4. SOVEREIGN INTEGRITY CHECK
- Does this change require any external API calls? [Yes/No]
- How does this adhere to the 'Algorithm returns home' principle?

### 5. PHYSICS-ALIGNED EVIDENCE

> *The algorithm always returns home. We merge only verifiable truth.*
